# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

# Template Name: Core Infrastructure Application Stack

resources:
  - type: compute.v1.network
    name: network
    properties:
      autoCreateSubnetworks: true
      name: ${project-id}-network

  - type: compute.v1.firewall
    name: network-firewall
    properties:
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports: ['22', '80']
      network: ${self.links.network.selfLink}

  - type: compute.v1.instance
    name: instance
    properties:
      machineType: f1-micro
      disks:
        - deviceName: boot
          type: pd-standard
          boot: true
      networkInterfaces:
        - network: ${self.links.network.selfLink}
          accessConfigs:
            - name: Public IP
              type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT

  - type: sqladmin.v1.databaseInstance
    name: database-instance
    properties:
      region: us-central1
      databaseVersion: POSTGRES_11
      settings:
        tier: DB_N1_STANDARD_1
      deletionProtection: false

  - type: sqladmin.v1.database
    name: database
    properties:
      instance: ${self.links.database-instance.selfLink}
      name: database
      charset: utf8
      collation: utf8_general_ci

  - type: storage.v1.bucket
    name: bucket
    properties:
      location: us-central1
      uniformBucketLevelAccess: true

  - type: compute.v1.address
    name: address
    properties:
      subnetwork: ${self.links.network.selfLink}
      addressType: EXTERNAL

  - type: compute.v1 forwarding-rule
    name: forwarding-rule
    properties:
      target: ${self.links.target-pool.selfLink}

  - type: compute.v1.url-mapper
    name: url-mapper
    properties:
      defaultService: ${self.links.instance.selfLink}
      hostRouts:
        - service: ${self.links.forwarding-rule.selfLink}
          routes:
            - path: '/*'
              urlMap: ${self.links.url-mapper.selfLink}

  - type: compute.v1 target-pool
    name: target-pool
    properties:
      instances: [${self.links.instance.selfLink}]
      sessionPersistenceConfig:
        enabled: true

  - type: compute.v1.target-http-proxy
    name: target-https-proxy
    properties:
      urlMap: ${self.links.url-mapper.selfLink}
